name: awsApiKeyAuthorizer
description: This policy configures Lambda authorizer for API key validation on AWS API Gateway. The Lambda function validates API keys and enforces API scoping.

policyAttributes.name: lambdaARN
policyAttributes.description: ARN of the Lambda function that validates API keys (e.g., arn:aws:lambda:{region}:{account}:function:{function-name})

policyAttributes.name: invokeRoleArn
policyAttributes.description: IAM Role ARN that allows API Gateway to invoke the Lambda authorizer (e.g., arn:aws:iam::{account}:role/{role-name})
